author: writer-6
authorized_by: coordinator-relayed cross-model pre-run review HOLD (2026-07-16) on glm-s4drop-0, directing: fix ALL findings (estimand confound, spurious-verdict paths, layer-count bug, power/budget defects), reset-refreeze in the lawful pre-final window, re-verify; bead kernel-of-truth-84gg; precedents registry/corrections/rules-1-c/2-prefreeze-correction.json (pre-signoff reset-refreeze) and registry/corrections/f1/1-prefreeze-correction.json
changes: ESTIMAND relabelled to review option (b) (ASM-2397): title, H-P, primary endpoint, kill text and envelope now name the COMPOSITE mask and state the contrast does NOT isolate causal evidence per se; option (a) documented as physically undoseable (causal core ~0.06-0.1% of miss-I/O under the full-scale mock).

Realized-dose currency moved to COMMON-TOKEN REPLAY of pinned s4-b0 reference trajectories, gate tightened 25% -> 5% of the dose; PASS dose floor on the same currency (ASM-2398); new kot-s4row/2 'replay' row kind; reference-trajectories/runner-script/staged-bytes-manifest added as PINNED-AT-INPUTS.

New MECHANICAL gates in the pinned analysis: quality_liveness_valid, family_valid (PINNED id->family mapping), pins_present_valid, live-ledger checkpoint verification; completeness restructured to PAIR-ONLY ZERO-MISSING primary with pairwise-complete secondaries and lawful ladder drops {r2,r3} only (ASM-2398/2400).

KILL trigger 1 moved from lb<=0 to one-sided 95% UPPER bound < SESOI (ASM-2399); lb<=0 with ub>=SESOI is INCONCLUSIVE; power re-derived (SESOI split ~0.05 kill / 0.50 validate / 0.45 inconclusive) and FULL-VERDICT power registered; stale iid MDE 0.043 retired.

Mask builder: MAIN_LAYERS 3..78 (76 layers, ASM-2342/2400); zero-dose => registered construction-kill manifest; identical blind/semd cell sets refused (ERR_S4_MASK_IDENTICAL); analysis gains phase='construction' mode so kill-2 and the dose-band stop are issuable from telemetry+masks alone pre-spend.

pins.analysis_script sha256 + output_fields (56 -> 68 pointers), pins.harness_manifest (builder sha, mock evidence, replay phase, kot-s4row/2), prereg_doc/analysis_plan_ref sha256s updated to the R2 design doc. verdict_rules and endpoint metric pointers structurally UNCHANGED (INSTRUMENT-INVALID / FAIL / PASS / INCONCLUSIVE on the same four pointers).

UNCHANGED (review-CONFIRMED sound): the freeze machinery, the three materialized corpus pins and their disjointness discipline (ASM-2391), the kot-corpus-hash/1 rule, seeds, budget caps, arm set, the one-primary-endpoint structure.
defect: CROSS-MODEL PRE-RUN REVIEW HOLD (2026-07-16), four classes: (A) ESTIMAND CONFOUND - the frozen primary labelled a data-richer COMPOSITE (22 causal cells + unvalidated atlas extension consuming ~100x more routing evidence) as a causal/semantic isolate, and the 'matched I/O' gate admitted 25% mismatch (an adversarial replay PASSed with the blind removing 24.9% MORE I/O, which confounds the quality comparison); (B) SPURIOUS-VERDICT PATHS - an all-equal/inert/rounded NLL readout could KILL on lb==0; dropping 5 SECONDARY rows flipped the primary T 0.0178->0.0520 (completeness pooled all 8 arms); a collapsed one-family label set PASSed; the mask builder crashed div-by-zero on a zero achievable dose and accepted identical SEM-D/blind masks in production; KILL trigger 2 was unfireable at the claimed pre-spend point (required quality items + all gates + >=$5 ledger); (C) LAYER-COUNT BUG - build_masks.py hard-coded 75 MoE layers (3..77) against the registered MEASURED correction ASM-2342 (76 layers, 3..78), silently dropping layer 78 from the dose denominator and every mask; runner/staged bytes unpinned; (D) POWER/BUDGET - ~36.6% KILL probability at the +0.05 SESOI under the lb<=0 rule (no-spurious-KILL violation); no full-verdict power; a stale iid MDE ~0.043 statement contradicting the cluster MDE 0.071; a post-hoc est_usd ledger; a degradation ladder that could zero the primary complete cases.
kill_criterion_status: kill_criterion_verbatim REWRITTEN pre-freeze (lawful in the pre-final window): trigger 1 boundary moved lb<=0 -> upper95 < SESOI per review finding D1; trigger 2 unchanged in substance but made issuable pre-spend; VALIDATE clause unchanged in substance (realized dose now on the replay currency). No run of any phase was ever graded under the superseded text.
legitimacy: Lawful pre-registration correction, NOT a post-hoc amendment (scope note: reset-correct-refreeze is lawful ONLY for a record NOT GNG-0-signed AND with NO final-phase run in its results-log; conditions conjunctive): at correction time glm-s4drop-0 was absent from registry/gng0-signoff.json frozen_records AND results-log/glm-s4drop-0.jsonl did not exist (no run record of ANY phase - the campaign never started; the S4_TABLE patch, telemetry, and masks were all still PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholders). No logged evidence predates the refreeze; the P-9 cutoff was not crossed. Reset to DRAFT, corrected, re-frozen through prereg-freeze under the full freeze-time lints.
verification: build_masks.py --selftest 25/25 green (incl. construction-kill, identical-mask, 76-layer/layer-78 checks); full-scale mock on real stage-3+atlas inputs with SYNTHETIC 76-layer telemetry (19,456 cells): s4-semd 426 cells @ 9.81% dose, all blind arms matched <= 1.0%; analysis/glm_s4drop_stdin.py --selftest 67/67 green, 68 output fields on every branch, byte-deterministic, all review adversarial replays now gated (inert/rounded NLLs -> INSTRUMENT-INVALID not KILL; secondary drops leave the primary bit-identical; collapsed families FAIL; 24.9% realized mismatch VOIDs io_match; placeholder pins rejected; $0/non-monotone/over-cap ledgers rejected); pre-freeze skeptic-5 re-attack on R2 (HOLD: 1 blocker + 2 majors + 4 minors) dispositioned in design doc SS12 (kill-1 realized-dose floor >= 8%; io_match power under stipulated rho 0.9; ERR_S4A_DOSE_INCOHERENT refusals; decode/replay rows corpus-bound; mutual blind-identity refusals; layer-78 atlas-absence + T-build/T-eval prefix disclosures); prereg-freeze DRY-RUN-OK then FROZEN 2026-07-16T08:41:30Z by writer-6.
